headline: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Valuation Check As Baird Issues Fresh Pick Call And Earnings Expectations Build
summary: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) has moved back into focus after Baird tagged the regional lender as a Fresh Pick and reiterated an Outperform rating, as investors look ahead to the upcoming first quarter earnings release. See our latest analysis for Huntington Bancshares. Despite Baird's Fresh Pick call and Huntington's branch expansion efforts, the share price has seen a 9.34% 1 month decline and an 11.73% year to date share price return. However, the 1 year total shareholder return of 5.98%...
